<div align="center">

# 🚀 Awesome Trending Repos

**A daily-updated, auto-curated list of the most awesome trending open-source repositories.**

[![Awesome](https://img.shields.io/badge/awesome-list-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/sindresorhus/awesome)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue?style=for-the-badge)](LICENSE)
[![Node.js](https://img.shields.io/badge/Node.js-18%2B-green?style=for-the-badge&logo=node.js)](https://nodejs.org/)

Enriched with deep insights and historical data, powered by GitHub Actions.

</div>

---

## ✨ Features

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50">

**🔄 Daily Updates**

</td>
<td width="50">

Automatically refreshed every day at midnight UTC

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50">

**📊 Historical Comparison**

</td>
<td width="50">

Shows changes since last update - new entrants, rank changes

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50">

**📈 Visual Graphs**

</td>
<td width="50">

ASCII bar charts and trend visualizations

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50">

**🏷️ Language Insights**

</td>
<td width="50">

Groups trending repos by programming language

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50">

**⭐ Growth Tracking**

</td>
<td width="50">

Shows 24-hour star growth for each repository

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50">

**🏆 Rising Stars**

</td>
<td width="50">

Highlights the fastest growing repositories

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50">

**💾 Data Persistence**

</td>
<td width="50">

Stores 7 days of historical snapshots

</td>
</tr>
</table>

---

## 📖 How It Works

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                     │
│   ┌──────────────┐     ┌──────────────┐     ┌──────────────┐      │
│   │  GitHub      │────▶│  Node.js     │────▶│  README.md   │      │
│   │  Actions     │     │  Script      │     │  (Updated)   │      │
│   │  (Daily)     │     │              │     │              │      │
│   └──────────────┘     └──────────────┘     └──────────────┘      │
│                                │                                   │
│                                ▼                                   │
│                         ┌──────────────┐                          │
│                         │  Data        │                          │
│                         │  Sources     │                          │
│                         │  • GitHub    │                          │
│                         │  • Search    │                          │
│                         └──────────────┘                          │
│                                                                     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

---

## 🗂️ Project Structure

```
awesome-trending-repos/
├── .github/workflows/
│   └── update-trends.yml    # Daily cron automation
├── .data/
│   ├── history.json         # Historical summary
│   └── snapshots/           # Daily snapshots (7 days)
├── src/
│   ├── data-sources/
│   │   ├── github-trending.js   # GitHub scraper
│   │   └── github-search.js     # Search API fallback
│   ├── utils/
│   │   ├── markdown.js          # Markdown generators
│   │   ├── insights.js          # Analytics engine
│   │   └── readme.js            # README updater
│   └── update.js                # Main entry point
├── package.json
└── README.md
```

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

| Component | Technology |
|-----------|------------|
| Runtime | [![Node.js](https://img.shields.io/badge/Node.js-18%2B-green?style=flat-square&logo=node.js)](https://nodejs.org/) |
| HTTP | [![Axios](https://img.shields.io/badge/Axios-1.8%2B-blue?style=flat-square)](https://axios-http.com/) |
| Parsing | [![Cheerio](https://img.shields.io/badge/Cheerio-1.0%2B-orange?style=flat-square)](https://cheerio.js.org/) |
| GitHub | [![Octokit](https://img.shields.io/badge/Octokit-4.0%2B-black?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/octokit/octokit.js) |
| Automation | [![GitHub Actions](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub%20Actions-Workflow-blue?style=flat-square&logo=githubactions)](https://github.com/features/actions) |
